title: Falcon  - Custom Button - Teams Detected
scenario: Custom Button "Other Providers" option is greyed out and inaccessible when Microsoft Teams is detected in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure your Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Scroll down and tap on "Custom Button".
5. Observe the two options displayed: "Microsoft Teams" and "Other Providers".
6. Note that "Microsoft Teams" is selected by default and "Other Providers" is greyed out.
7. Read the message displayed: "Microsoft Teams is connected. Other Providers is not available when Microsoft Teams is connected."
8. Attempt to tap on the "Other Providers" option.
expected: The "Other Providers" option should be selectable and functional, allowing the user to configure the custom button for non-Microsoft Teams providers even when Microsoft Teams is detected.
